rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area (Sukhumvit/Silom); avg ~28,000 THB/mo

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; A/C heavy in hot months

groceries.note: home cooking; local markets vs. international supermarkets

diningOut.note: mix of street food, local restaurants, occasional Western cafe

misc.note: gym, massages (~$8-12), entertainment, personal care, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.claim: Average monthly rent for 1BR in Bangkok ~28,000 THB (~$800); Sukhumvit/Silom runs 30,000-70,000 THB
evidence.quote: the average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in Bangkok is around 28,000 baht, which translates to approximately $800
Total monthly budget for Bangkok is 44,500–80,000 THB (USD $1,220–$2,200) for a comfortable lifestyle in a central location

evidence.claim: Bangkok coworking hot desks: Hubba $120-200/mo, JustCo $100-250/mo, The Hive $150-250/mo
evidence.quote: The majority of Bangkok's coworking spaces fall into the mid-range category, with day passes ranging from 350-500 THB and monthly rates from 4,000-6,000 THB
Utilities—including electricity, water, and building fees—typically add $50–90 per month, depending on air-conditioning use
